text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "procdump.exe, launched by a suspicious parent (winx64_payload.exe), is used to dump the memory of lsass.exe to a temporary file, which is a common technique for credential theft.",
  "indicators": [
    "procdump.exe",
    "lsass.exe",
    "credential dumping",
    "winx64_payload.exe",
    "memory dump",
    "C:\\Windows\\Temp\\lsass_dump.dmp"
  ]
}
